why_now: TB-208 just landed (`e2179b9`, 2026-05-13T01:35:43Z) with an explicit deferred-task pointer in its module docstring; TB-207 just landed (`5d1d197`, 2026-05-13T02:09:58Z) introducing the `_collect_cli_verbs` walk that this task extracts.
